message:
feat(lint): implement ValidationRule trait and framework

Adds the core validation framework for skill linting:
- ValidationRule trait for implementing custom rules
- ValidationEngine for running rules against skills
- Diagnostic types with spans and suggestions
- ValidationConfig for configuring rule behavior
- Support for severity overrides, strict mode, max errors
- Auto-fix framework (rules can implement fixes)

This unblocks:
- meta_skill-pn04: Security validation rules
- meta_skill-pxl3: Structural validation rules
- meta_skill-niok: Quality validation rules

Closes: meta_skill-expg

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
